description_long: This is a tall, narrow chest of drawers with a sleek, modern design, finished in a deep black color. The unit features five evenly spaced drawers, each with a small, round handle centered on the drawer front, providing a minimalist aesthetic. The chest stands on short, sturdy legs that slightly elevate it from the ground, giving it a subtle sense of lightness. The surfaces appear smooth and hard, likely constructed from painted or laminated wood, with a matte or semi-gloss finish. There are no visible decorative embellishments, locks, or branding, emphasizing its utilitarian and contemporary style. This piece would be suitable for use in urban interiors such as apartments, offices, or garages, offering practical storage in a compact footprint.
description: A tall, black, modern chest of drawers with five drawers and round central handles, featuring a smooth, minimalist finish. The design is simple and functional, with no visible decorations or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five drawers with round central handles clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the depth of the chest and the side profiles of the drawers and handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, featureless back panel with no handles or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side profiles of the drawers and handles.
